title: Nizam Ecosystem Membership Run Result Schema
description: Validates the aggregate, ecosystem-LEVEL result that tools/ecosystem_membership_run.py emits after iterating a membership registry's in_scope set (NIP-0002 Stage 3; NDEBT-031). Where each member's Preflight is a single-repository verdict, this artifact rolls the per-member verdicts up into ONE ecosystem verdict and records the cross-repository CONSISTENCY the shipped single-repo tools only guarded as a 'future extension': every in_scope member MUST have run under the same framework pin (the resolved_sha recorded in each member's provenance). A divergent or missing pin is a first-class recorded consistency finding, not a silent mismatch. The relational invariant 'a pin-inconsistent ecosystem cannot be PASS' is expressed as an if/then constraint here (schema-checkable), mirroring how the tool computes the verdict.

member_result.description: One in_scope member's per-repository outcome within the run.

name.description: The member's identifying key (from the membership registry).

repo_root.description: The resolved repo-root the stage ran against.

preflight_exit.description: The stage tool's exit code for this member (null when the member's repo-root was missing/unrunnable).

verdict.description: The human-legible Preflight verdict (PASS / PASS_WITH_EXCEPTIONS / FAIL / exit_N).

status.description: Whether this member's outcome is acceptable (PASS / PASS_WITH_EXCEPTIONS), a hard fail, or a missing repo-root.

framework_pin.description: The framework pin (provenance resolved_sha) this member ran under; null when no pin could be read.

schema_version.description: The semantic version of this result shape.

membership_registry.description: Path to the membership registry that was iterated.

ecosystem_verdict.description: The single ecosystem-level verdict: PASS iff every in_scope member returned an acceptable Preflight verdict AND all members ran under the same framework pin; FAIL otherwise.

framework_pin_consistent.description: True iff every in_scope member ran under the same, non-null framework pin (resolved_sha).

framework_pin.description: The common framework pin when consistent; null when members diverge or a pin is missing.

member_count.description: The number of in_scope members iterated.

consistency_findings.description: Recorded cross-repository consistency findings (e.g. a member on a divergent or missing pin). Empty when the ecosystem is pin-consistent.

allOf.description: A pin-inconsistent ecosystem cannot be PASS: if framework_pin_consistent is false, ecosystem_verdict MUST be FAIL.
